hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite arXiv papers with fabricated IDs, titles, or future dates (2025) that do not correspond to real publications. Examples include PAT-Agent (arXiv:2509.23675, 2025), SLD-Spec (arXiv:2509.09917, 2025), and the unrelated 'Unprecedented Code Change Automation' (arXiv:2402.07138).
hallucinations.evidence: References section: [1] PAT-Agent: arXiv:2509.23675, 2025; [2] SLD-Spec: arXiv:2509.09917, 2025; [7] Unprecedented Code Change Automation: arXiv:2402.07138, 2024.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations found: several nonexistent/fake citations. Experimental results, methodology, and math appear consistent with provided code and logs (no faked results or methodology hallucinations).
